Class TeslaTower

java.lang.Object
tower.Tower
tower.TeslaTower
public class TeslaTower extends Tower
An elite fusion tower that combines exceptional engagement range with extreme firing velocity. * The TeslaTower is the advanced result of merging a Zap Tower and a Range Tower. Designed for high-precision and high-frequency strikes, it possesses a massive detection radius and the lowest attack cooldown in the game. It functions as a "Long-range Striker," capable of eliminating targets across a significant portion of the map with lightning-fast projectiles.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class tower.Tower

    bulletDamage, bulletSpeed, cooldown, imagePath, name, placeSoundPath, range, stunned, stunTimer, timer, x, y

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TeslaTower(double x, double y)
    Constructs a TeslaTower with peak performance statistics: - Range: 250 units (Long-range coverage) - Cooldown: 0.3 seconds (The fastest attack speed in the game) - Damage: 15 (High single-target DPS) - Bullet Speed: 300 units/sec (Ultra-fast projectiles to match range)

  • Constructor Details

    • TeslaTower

      public TeslaTower(double x, double y)
      Constructs a TeslaTower with peak performance statistics: - Range: 250 units (Long-range coverage) - Cooldown: 0.3 seconds (The fastest attack speed in the game) - Damage: 15 (High single-target DPS) - Bullet Speed: 300 units/sec (Ultra-fast projectiles to match range)
      Parameters:
      x - Horizontal position on the map.
      y - Vertical position on the map.

  • Method Details

    • findTarget

      protected List<Enemy> findTarget(List<Enemy> enemies)
      Identifies the optimal target using advanced long-range logic. * Similar to the Range Tower, this implementation removes all type restrictions, allowing it to strike any living enemy (including high-speed or flying units). It prioritizes the "First" enemy—the one furthest along the path—to ensure maximum defensive efficiency.
      Overrides:
      findTarget in class Tower
      Parameters:
      enemies - List of all active enemies in the battlefield.
      Returns:
      A list containing the single most progressed target within range.

    • shoot

      protected void shoot(Enemy target, List<Bullet> bullets)
      Dispatches a high-velocity Bullet toward the targeted enemy. * Due to the 0.3s cooldown and 300 bullet speed, the tower provides almost continuous projectile flow, effectively shredding enemy health bars before they can exit the engagement zone.
      Specified by:
      shoot in class Tower
      Parameters:
      target - The enemy identified as the priority target.
      bullets - The global projectile list.
